title: Bad To The Bone
description: This recourse pack makes skeletons and wither skeletons bad to the bone
body:
# **This is a bit Baaaaaad**
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Y8Y1138BQD)

- This recource pack changes Skeleton, Wither Skeleton, Bogged, Stray, and Skeleton horse idle sounds to the Bad to the Bone riff
- Changes the say1-3.ogg's, the idle1-4.ogg's, and the ambient1-4.ogg's
- **Skeletons are ba ba ba baaaad**
